content.en:
"Why are you here?"

King Hannan looked at these king-level powerhouses who suddenly arrived, and his face changed suddenly.

These king-level powerhouses are basically not weaker than him, and some of them are even stronger than him.

Moreover, these king-level powerhouses belong to various forces, and all of them have extraordinary backgrounds.

Then. One of the king-level powerhouses spoke: "King Hannan, Zhou Tian's matter has already spread, he should have a strong sword skill inheritance, you are not the only one who is interested, do you think you are tracking Zhou Tian? In fact, you also have chess pieces planted by us in your subordinates, and when Zhou Tian is discovered, these chess pieces will transmit information to us." "

Another king-level powerhouse said: "King Hannan, I won't embarrass you, how about copying each of this inheritance?"

"Good!"

King Hannan reluctantly agreed.

If he doesn't agree, it is estimated that these kings will join forces to deal with him, and then he will not even have his life, let alone get the mysterious sword skills.

"Come here, little one!"

A king-level appeared in front of Zhou Tian at an extremely fast speed, grabbed Zhou Tian's shoulder, and wanted to grab Zhou Tian away.

"It's too fast!"

Zhou Tian didn't have time to react at all, and the momentum of the king level was suppressed on his body, making it difficult for him to even move the knife.

At this time, he finally knew how powerful the king level was, and his strength was still far from the king level.

But just when the hand of the king-level powerhouse was about to grab Zhou Tian, everything came to a standstill.

Zhou Tian watched as this king-level was frozen in mid-air, and the whole person was completely unable to move.

"It's the master who made a move!"

Zhou Tian realized.

"Extinguish!"

A faint voice came.

In the next moment, this king-level powerhouse turned into countless fragments and dissipated between heaven and earth.

"Run!"

The pupils of King Hannan and the others shrank sharply.

A king-level powerhouse was silently wiped out, how powerful this person should be, it is definitely an existence above the king-level.

Such a strong man is not something they can compete with at all, and if they don't escape, they will definitely die.

However, when these king-level powerhouses were about to fly away, a wave of fluctuations froze this space.

Then the space shook, and all these king-level powerhouses were shocked into powder.

Wow!

Ye Tian walked out of the void and stood in front of Zhou Tian.

Zhou Tian looked at all this in a daze, and opened his mouth wide in disbelief.

How powerful these king-level powerhouses were, but in front of his master Ye Tian, they were like ants, killed one by one, and even the corpses didn't even exist.

This was the first time he had seen his master make a move, and he finally realized how powerful his master was.

"Sunday, I'm going to leave, and when I'm leaving, you can take your sister out of this mountain range, this planet is also very vast for you. The position you are in now is just one of the many empires on this planet. Ye Tian admonished.

"Master, do you really want to leave?"

Zhou Tian was a little reluctant.

"I've been on this planet for enough time, and if I continue to stay, I'll be delayed. Before I leave, I'll give you a little thing. "

Ye Tian casually took out a Void Mina Ring and said, "This is the Void Mina Ring, which contains a lot of space inside, and I have put some things in it. Only when your strength reaches a certain level can you take out the contents of it. "

"Thank you, Master!"

Zhou Tian took the Sumeru vow.

In fact, there are not too many precious resources in this Void Mina Ring, the most precious of which is a small spaceship.

This planet is an indigenous planet, far away from other civilization planets, if there is a spaceship, it will be much more convenient, otherwise even if Zhou Tiantian becomes an emperor in the future, relying on his own speed to fly slowly, I am afraid it will waste a lot of time.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai left this small spaceship.

"I'm gone!"

Ye Tian turned around and left, disappearing.

"Master, the disciple will definitely become strong and will not let you down!"

Zhou Tian muttered.

......

Beyond this star.

Ye Tian took out his spaceship and sat inside.

The spaceship starts and disappears into the galaxy in the blink of an eye.

In the following days, Ye Tian did his best to perfect the Dao Peerless Tianyue Knife.

In the previous epiphany, although he had perfected the sword path mastery, the sword path mastery could be perfected again.

So, while Ye Tian was training, he perfected the sword path mastery.

In the blink of an eye.

Another decade has passed.

During these ten years, Ye Tian once again perfected the Heavenly Moon Knife of the Dao Peerless Sect, and now the Moon Dao has become the strongest ordinary level Dao Peerless Sect Sect Peerless Sect Sect Sect Peerless Sect Sect Peerless T

And because of this, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed.

In addition, Ye Tian also consumed a lot of Chaos Crystals, and the Chaos Body Refining Technique had also improved slightly.

The only pity is that the Divine Secret Art has not yet been created.

Ye Tian's Divine Dictionary is the Chaos Supreme Divine Codex, and it is the strongest Divine Instrument of the Human Race, so it is naturally far more difficult to create the Chaos Divine Codex Secret Technique than other Divine Codex Secret Techniques.

Of course, Ye Tian was only one step away from creating the Divine Secret Technique.

There have been many times when he had a flash of inspiration, as if he was about to create a canonical secret technique, but in the end, it was only a fraction of a sudden.

this day.

Ye Tian returned to the Milky Way Earth.

After 30 years of training, it was long enough for Ye Tian, and if he continued to practice, it would be of no use to him.

Earth.

When Ye Tian came back, the happiest person was undoubtedly the Moon Emperor.

Ye Tian accompanied the Moon Emperor for half a month, and then came to the Kunlun Mountains.

Deep underground in the Kunlun Mountains, there is an underground space, and in that underground space, there is a World Tree that is evolving into the Chaos Ancient Tree.

Ye Tian wanted to see how this World Tree had evolved?

Soon, Ye Tian entered the underground space of the Kunlun Mountain Range.

A huge World Tree took root deep underground, and its trunk anchored this side of the space.

A shattered ancient well of chaos is merging with the World Tree.

At this time, this broken Chaos Ancient Well has been fused by more than seventy percent, and only three percent have not been fused, once this thirty percent Chaos Ancient Well is completely swallowed by the World Tree, then the World Tree will evolve into the Chaos Ancient Tree.

Ye Tian didn't dare to move the World Tree and the Chaos Ancient Well now, in case he disrupted the balance and caused the World Tree to fail in evolution, then the loss would be great.

Although the World Tree is precious, its value is much worse than that of the Chaos Ancient Tree.

Ye Tian stood cross-legged at the entrance of the underground space, watching the evolution of the World Tree towards the Chaos Ancient Tree.

Time passed slowly.

Suddenly.

One of the branches of the World Tree has changed, and it is evolving towards the branch of the Chaos Ancient Tree.

I saw that this branch contained a strong chaotic power, and there was a faint pattern of chaos law on the branch.

Ye Tian looked at this transformation process intently, and suddenly felt a sense in his heart.

"The transformation of the law of chaos, the use of chaos power, I have always thought wrong, I have always wanted to create a pure chaos move, completely control the chaos power to attack, but in fact, such a chaos move is too advanced. The Chaos Codex Secret Technique only needs to be able to mobilize the power of Chaos, which does not mean that it cannot be mixed with other powers. The branches of this World Tree now possess both the power of the World Tree and the power of the Chaos Ancient Tree, and the two have fused perfectly without collapsing. If I can follow suit, I might be able to create a Chaos Codex Mystic. "

Ye Tiandang even began to create and comprehend.

As time passed, scales appeared on Ye Tian's body.

These scales were the scales of Ye Tian's cultivation of the Dark Scale Demon Body Technique, but now Ye Tian wanted to use the Dark Scale Demon Body Technique as the basis to transform this ten-star defense secret technique, and fuse the power of the Chaos Body Refining Technique to create a new Chaos Divine Code Secret Technique.

Gradually, these scales turned chaotic color, and there were more and more scales, enveloping Ye Tian.

At first, these scales were still relatively fragile, but as Ye Tian continued to improve.

In the end, these scales are not only extremely strong, but also have a faint pattern of chaos law on the scales, full of chaos aura.

Under the time acceleration of the time talent, Ye Tian also spent a whole year to finally create a Chaos Divine Codex Secret Technique.

Ye Tian named this Chaos Divine Codex Secret Technique Chaos Yuan Scale Armor!

When he cast the Hybrid Scale Armor, his whole body would be covered in countless Chaos Scales, as if he was wearing a pair of full-body scale armor.

This hybrid scale armor secret technique is not only defense, but also immune to some attribute attacks, and has the effect of amplifying strength.

It can be said that the Chaos Yuan Scale Armor Secret Technique fully demonstrated a small part of the power of the Chaos Dao of the Supreme Divine Codex, which was much better than Ye Tian expected.

Originally, the Xuanyuan Juggernaut only asked Ye Tian to create the weakest and simplest Chaos Divine Codex Secret Technique, but Ye Tian now far exceeded the Xuanyuan Juggernaut's expectations.

If the Xuanyuan Lord knew that Ye Tian had created such a divine secret technique as the Mixed Yuan Scale Armor, he would definitely be very surprised.

"The Tianyue Sword has perfected into the strongest ordinary-level sword path mastery, and now I have created a divine secret technique such as the Chaos Scale Armor, my strength is much stronger than when I left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race!"

Ye Tian estimated that his strength had reached the first grade of the Eternal Universe Child.

Of course, whether he really reached this level or not, he needed to return to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race and enter the ninth layer of the battle tower in the yellow-level region to test it.

At this time, Ye Tian's gaze stared at the World Tree for a while, and muttered, "Looking at this scene, it will take decades for the World Tree to transform into a Chaos Ancient Tree. "

Ye Tian didn't linger here, turned around and left here.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to prepare to return to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

There is not much time left until that prosperous era, and he needs to return to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race for the final sprint, and raise his strength to a stronger level as much as possible.

this day.

Ye Tian left the earth, took a spaceship and rushed to the Hengpan Continent in the Panpan Continent, and returned to the Terran Sanctuary by the teleportation stone gate of the Hengpan Continent.
